languages.text: "Вот уж не думал... Как скажете, Ваша Светлость. Искупление для одного. И сегодня это точно не я".
"Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."
languages.original_text: "Вот уж не думал... Как скажете, Ваша Светлость. Искупление для одного. И сегодня это точно не я".

traits.locale_text: "That's... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And it sure is not going to be me today."
"Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."
"Well. Who among us doesn't dream of glory and freedom? Even if for one."
"That's... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And it sure is not going to be me today."
"Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."

languages.text: 「そうだな。栄光と自由を夢見ていない者は、我々の中にいないだろう。たとえ一瞬でも」
languages.original_text: "Well. Who among us doesn't dream of glory and freedom? Even if for one."

traits.locale_text: 「そうだな。栄光と自由を夢見ていない者は、我々の中にいないだろう。たとえ一瞬でも。」

languages.text: "Ben... Nasıl isterseniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sona kalana kefaret. Bugün sona kalan kesinlikle ben olmayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Nasıl isterseniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sona kalana kefaret. Bugün sona kalan kesinlikle ben olmayacağım."

languages.text: «Nunca pensé que... Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Expiación para el último. Y hoy está claro que no seré yo».
languages.original_text: "Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."

traits.locale_text: «Nunca pensé que... Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Expiación para el último. Y hoy está claro que no seré yo».

languages.text: “真没想到我会……如您所愿，舰长大人。一人之赎。不过今天这赎罪的，绝对轮不到我。
languages.original_text: "Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."

traits.locale_text: “真没想到我会……如您所愿，舰长大人。一人之赎。不过今天这赎罪的，绝对轮不到我。

languages.text: « Je n'aurais jamais cru que… Très bien, Votre Seigneurie. Expiation pour un seul. Et aujourd'hui, ce ne sera sûrement pas moi. »
languages.original_text: "Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'aurais jamais cru que… Très bien, Votre Seigneurie. Expiation pour un seul. Et aujourd'hui, ce ne sera sûrement pas moi. »

languages.text: "Ich hätte nie gedacht ... Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Sühne für den Einzelnen. Und heute werde es sicher nicht ich sein."
languages.original_text: "Never thought I'd... As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Atonement for the one. And today it's definitely not going to be me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte nie gedacht ... Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Sühne für den Einzelnen. Und heute werde es sicher nicht ich sein."
